button.base: w-full font-bold text-lg rounded-2xl transition-all duration-150 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none outline-none focus-visible:ring-4 focus-visible:ring-white/50
button.ghost_white: bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-sm border-2 border-white/30 shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)] hover:bg-white/30

card.base: bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_0_0_rgb(226,232,240)] p-5 relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_12px_0_0_rgb(226,232,240)]

inputs.base: w-full bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-4 text-lg font-bold focus:border-slate-400 focus:ring-0 outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400 transition-colors shadow-sm text-slate-800

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border-2 border-slate-200

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` for icons and `framer-motion` for animations.
Add Nunito font to the project: `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&display=swap');` in index.css.
The App must be a Mobile-First layout, meaning limit max-width to 480px (e.g. `max-w-md mx-auto`) to mimic a native app feel on desktop, wrapped in a container that fills the screen.
The background color of the main wrapper MUST change dynamically based on the Category state (Yellow, Green, Orange, Blue, Purple, Pink). Add a smooth CSS transition to the background color change.

For the Mascot: DO NOT use external images. Create a React component `<BlobMascot category={category} />` using SVG. Draw a rounded organic blob shape using SVG `<path>`. Inside, draw two large white circles for eyes with black pupils, and a mouth. Animate the expression (path d attribute or mouth shape) and color of the blob based on the category (e.g., Pink blob with hearts for relationships, Blue with glasses for tech, Orange with sweatband for gym).

Buttons and Cards MUST strictly follow the 3D Neobrutalist 'Duolingo' style: they need a heavy bottom shadow (`shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgb(...)]`), 2px border, and on `:active`, translate-y down by the shadow amount and remove the shadow to feel like a real physical press.
Inputs and Dropdowns should also be heavily rounded (`rounded-2xl`), bold text, with 2px borders.
Use framer-motion for the Hook cards entering the screen (staggered fade up).
Implement Sonner or a custom Framer Motion toast for the 'Copied ✅' notification, with a bounce effect.
Rate Limit Modal should pop up with a spring animation and have a friendly tone, even though it blocks the user.
Store history and usage limit in localStorage. Do not forget the Privacy Policy page link in the footer.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
